title: poa gracilis
intro: Poa gracilis, also known as blue grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa gracilis include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Poa gracilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
